name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES state, turn, N, i
(* Type definition for state *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ N ∈ Nat
    /\ N > 0
    /\ state ∈ [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
    /\ turn ∈ 1..N

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ N = 3
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
    /\ turn = 1

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Process i's transition *)

    /\ i ∈ 1..N
    /\ state[i] = "idle"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
    /\ turn' = turn
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, turn, N>>

ProcessTry(i) == 
    /\ i ∈ 1..N
    /\ state[i] = "trying"
    /\ turn = i
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, N>>

ProcessExit(i) == 
    /\ i ∈ 1..N
    /\ state[i] = "critical"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
    /\ turn' = (i % N) + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, N>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :


(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Mutual exclusion invariant *)
MutualExcl == 
    \A i, j \in 1..N :
        /\ i /= j
        => ~(state[i] = "critical" /\ state[j] = "critical")

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification *)
Spec == 
    /\ TypeOK
    /\ Init
    /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn, N>>
    /\ MutualExcl

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, state, log, decision
ParticipantStates == {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* States for coordinator *)
CoordinatorStates == {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* All possible states for any identifier *)
AllStates == ParticipantStates \cup CoordinatorStates

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ participants \subseteq 1..N
    /\ coordinator \in 1..N
    /\ participants \# {coordinator}
    /\ state = [id \in participants \cup {coordinator} |-> "Init"]
    /\ log = <<>>
    /\ decision = "None"

(* Helper to send a message *)
SendMsg(msg, from, to) ==
    /\ log' = Append(log, [msg, from, to])
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, decision>>

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
SendPrepare ==
    /\ \E p \in participants:
        /\ state[p] = "Init"
        /\ SendMsg("Prepare", coordinator, p)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Prepared"]
    /\ UNCHANGED decision

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes Yes *)
VoteYes(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = "Init"
    /\ SendMsg("VoteYes", p, coordinator)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<log, decision>>

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes No *)
VoteNo(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = "Init"
    /\ SendMsg("VoteNo", p, coordinator)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<log, decision>>

(* Coordinator decides Commit if all voted Yes *)
DecideCommit ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = "Prepared"
    /\ \A p \in participants: state[p] = "Prepared"
    /\ decision' = "Commit"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Committed"]
    /\ UNCHANGED log

(* Coordinator decides Abort if any voted No *)
DecideAbort ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = "Prepared"
    /\ \E p \in participants: state[p] = "Aborted"
    /\ decision' = "Abort"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Aborted"]
    /\ UNCHANGED log

(* Coordinator sends Commit to all participants *)
SendCommit ==
    /\ decision = "Commit"
    /\ \E p \in participants:
        /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
        /\ SendMsg("Commit", coordinator, p)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Committed"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<log, decision>>

(* Coordinator sends Abort to all participants *)
SendAbort ==
    /\ decision = "Abort"
    /\ \E p \in participants:
        /\ state[p] = "Aborted"
        /\ SendMsg("Abort", coordinator, p)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Aborted"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<log, decision>>

(* Participant receives Commit *)
ReceiveCommit(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
    /\ SendMsg("Commit", p, coordinator)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<log, decision>>

(* Participant receives Abort *)
ReceiveAbort(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = "Aborted"
    /\ SendMsg("Abort", p, coordinator)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<log, decision>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ \E p \in participants: VoteYes(p)
    \/ \E p \in participants: VoteNo(p)
    \/ SendPrepare
    \/ DecideCommit
    \/ DecideAbort
    \/ SendCommit
    \/ SendAbort
    \/ \E p \in participants: ReceiveCommit(p)
    \/ \E p \in participants: ReceiveAbort(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, log, decision>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ participants \subseteq 1..N
    /\ coordinator \in 1..N
    /\ participants \# {coordinator}
    /\ state \in [participants \cup {coordinator} -> AllStates]
    /\ log \in <<[msg: {"Prepare","VoteYes","VoteNo","Commit","Abort"}, from: 1..N, to: 1..N]>>*
    /\ decision \in {"Commit", "Abort", "None"}

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT N \* Number of philosophers and forks, N

VARIABLES forks, states
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state: all forks free, all philosophers thinking *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
Hungry(i) == /\ states[i] = "thinking"
            /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
            /\ forks' = forks

(* Action: philosopher i picks up left and right forks if both are free *)
PickUp(i) == /\ states[i] = "hungry"
            /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
            /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
            /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
            /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down both forks *)
PutDown(i) == /\ states[i] = "eating"
             /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
             /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
             /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
             /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation: any philosopher can become hungry, pick up forks, or put down forks *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          (Hungry(i) \/ PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type checking invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] \in 1..N

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i
   flag[i] is TRUE if process i is choosing a number
*)

(* Number of processes *)
N == Len(num)

(* Initialization *)
Init ==
    /\ num \in [1..N -> 0]
    /\ flag \in [1..N -> FALSE]

(* Choosing phase: process i sets flag[i] to TRUE *)
Choosing(i) ==
    /\ flag[i] = FALSE
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED num

(* Numbering phase: process i assigns a ticket number *)
Numbering(i) ==
    /\ flag[i] = TRUE
    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Entering critical section: process i checks if it has the lowest ticket *)
Entering(i) ==
    /\ flag[i] = FALSE
    /\ num[i] > 0
    /\ \A j \in 1..N :
        j /= i
        /\ (num[j] = 0 \/ num[j] > num[i] \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j > i))
    /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

(* Exiting critical section: process i resets its ticket number *)
Exiting(i) ==
    /\ flag[i] = FALSE
    /\ num[i] > 0
    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED flag

(* Next state: any process can be in any phase *)
Next ==
    \E i \in 1..N :
        Choosing(i) \/ Numbering(i) \/ Entering(i) \/ Exiting(i)

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
    /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>> /\ TypeOK

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, representing the buffer *)
(* head and tail are indices into q, modulo K *)
(* size is the number of elements currently in the queue *)

(* Helper functions *)
headIndex == head \* K
tailIndex == tail \* K

(* The queue is represented as a sequence of length K, with unused slots filled with 0 *)
(* For simplicity, we assume the queue holds natural numbers *)

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ q \in Seq(K)
      /\ head = 0
      /\ tail = 0
      /\ size = 0
      /\ \A i \in 0..K-1: q[i] = 0

(* Producer action: blocks when full *)
Producer == /\ size < K
          /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
             /\ tail' = tail
             /\ size' = size + 1
             /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 1] \* 1 is the produced value
          /\ UNCHANGED <<q, head, tail, size>>

(* Consumer action: blocks when empty *)
Consumer == /\ size > 0
          /\ head' = head
             /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
             /\ size' = size - 1
             /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 0] \* 0 is the consumed value
          /\ UNCHANGED <<q, head, tail, size>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == Producer \/ Consumer

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(K)
        /\ head \in 0..K-1
        /\ tail \in 0..K-1
        /\ size \in 0..K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
CONSTANTS NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* --type definitions-- *)
StateType == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}
ServerId == 1..3

(* --initialization-- *)
Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = [s \in ServerId |-> NULL]
  /\ state = [s \in ServerId |-> "Follower"]

(* --state transitions-- *)
FollowerToCandidate ==
  /\ state[s] = "Follower"
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>> \ {s}

CandidateToLeader ==
  /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
  /\ votedFor' = votedFor
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>> \ {s}

(* --vote request handling-- *)
VoteRequest ==
  /\ state[s] = "Follower"
  /\ term = currentTerm
  /\ votedFor[s] = NULL \/ votedFor[s] = s
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>> \ {s}

(* --next state-- *)
Next ==
  \E s \in ServerId :
    \/ FollowerToCandidate
    \/ CandidateToLeader
    \/ VoteRequest

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ currentTerm \in Nat
  /\ votedFor \in [ServerId -> ServerId \cup {NULL}]
  /\ state \in [ServerId -> StateType]

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == /\ readers \in Nat
        /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

(* Reader actions *)
ReaderAcquire ==
    /\ writer_active = FALSE
    /\ readers' = readers + 1
    /\ writer_active' = writer_active
    /\ UNCHANGED <<writer_active>>

ReaderRelease ==
    /\ readers > 0
    /\ readers' = readers - 1
    /\ writer_active' = writer_active
    /\ UNCHANGED <<writer_active>>

(* Writer actions *)
WriterAcquire ==
    /\ readers = 0
    /\ writer_active' = TRUE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<readers>>

WriterRelease ==
    /\ writer_active = TRUE
    /\ writer_active' = FALSE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<readers>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ ReaderAcquire
      \/ ReaderRelease
      \/ WriterAcquire
      \/ WriterRelease

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Channels, InitState
VARIABLES channelState, markerReceived, markerSent, recorded, state


(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ state \in [1..N -> Nat]
    /\ channelState \in [1..N -> [1..N -> Seq(Nat)]]
    /\ markerSent \in [1..N -> [1..N -> BOOLEAN]]
    /\ recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ markerReceived \in [1..N -> [1..N -> BOOLEAN]]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : \A j \in 1..N : 
        j \in DOMAIN Channels[i] => 
            /\ channelState[i][j] \in Seq(Nat)
            /\ markerSent[i][j] \in BOOLEAN
            /\ markerReceived[i][j] \in BOOLEAN
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : recorded[i] \in BOOLEAN

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ state = InitState
    /\ channelState = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> <<>>]]
    /\ markerSent = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]]
    /\ recorded = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
    /\ markerReceived = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]]

(* Sending a marker on channel (i,j) *)
SendMarker(i, j) == 
    /\ markerSent[i][j] = FALSE
    /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i][j] = TRUE]
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i][j] = Append(channelState[i][j], "marker")]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, markerReceived>>

(* Receiving a marker on channel (i,j) *)
ReceiveMarker(i, j) == 
    /\ channelState[i][j] = <<>> \/ channelState[i][j][1] = "marker"
    /\ markerReceived[i][j] = FALSE
    /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![i][j] = TRUE]
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i][j] = Tail(channelState[i][j])]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, markerSent>>

(* Recording local state of process i *)
RecordState(i) == 
    /\ recorded[i] = FALSE
    /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = state[i] + 1] \* Example state update
    /\ UNCHANGED <<channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>

(* Sending a normal message on channel (i,j) *)
SendMessage(i, j, msg) == 
    /\ markerSent[i][j] = FALSE
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i][j] = Append(channelState[i][j], msg)]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, markerSent, markerReceived>>

(* Receiving a normal message on channel (i,j) *)
ReceiveMessage(i, j, msg) == 
    /\ channelState[i][j] = <<>> \/ channelState[i][j][1] = msg
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i][j] = Tail(channelState[i][j])]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, markerSent, markerReceived>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..N : 
        j \in DOMAIN Channels[i] /\ 
        (SendMarker(i, j) \/ ReceiveMarker(i, j) \/ 
         RecordState(i) \/ 
         SendMessage(i, j, "msg") \/ 
         ReceiveMessage(i, j, "msg"))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channelState, markerSent, recorded, markerReceived>> /\ TypeOK

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES tokenPos, messages

(* Constants *)
CONSTANT N

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == /\ tokenPos \in 1..N
          /\ messages \in [1..N -> Seq(Nat)]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ tokenPos = 1
        /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> <<>>]

(* Next state *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ tokenPos' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1
          /\ messages' = [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i THEN <<>> ELSE messages[j]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<tokenPos, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

(* The store is a partial function from Keys to Values *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

Init == store \in [Keys -> Values] /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

(* Put operation: updates the value for a key *)
Put(k, v) == /\ k \in Keys
              /\ v \in Values
              /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Get operation: reads the value for a key *)
Get(k) == /\ k \in Keys
           /\ store' = store

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v)
      \/ \E k \in Keys : Get(k)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SingleDecreePaxos ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
CONSTANTS NULL

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, ballots, promises, accepts, chosen, chosenBallot, chosenBy, Proposer, b, v
HighestBallot(vs) == IF vs = {} THEN 0 ELSE MAX vs

\* Proposer's current ballot
CurrentBallot(p) == ballots[p]

\* Promise state of an acceptor
PromiseState(a) == promises[a]

\* Accepted state of an acceptor
AcceptState(a) == accepts[a]

\* Initial state
Init ==
    /\ acceptors = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5}          \* Example set of 5 acceptors
    /\ proposers = {1, 2, 3}                \* Example set of 3 proposers
    /\ ballots = [p \in proposers |-> 0]
    /\ promises = [a \in acceptors |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
    /\ accepts = [a \in acceptors |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
    /\ chosen = NULL
    /\ chosenBallot = 0
    /\ chosenBy = NULL

\* Prepare/Promise phase
Prepare(p, v) ==
    /\ p \in proposers
    /\ v \in Nat
    /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![p] = ballots[p] + 1]
    /\ LET b' = ballots'[p] IN
        /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![a] = 
            IF promises[a].ballot < b' THEN [ballot |-> b', value |-> v]

    /\ accepts' = accepts
    /\ chosen' = chosen
    /\ chosenBallot' = chosenBallot
    /\ chosenBy' = chosenBy

\* Accept/Accepted phase
Accept(p, v) ==
    /\ p \in proposers
    /\ v \in Nat
    /\ LET b == ballots[p] IN
        /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![a] = 
            IF promises[a].ballot = b THEN [ballot |-> b, value |-> v]

    /\ promises' = promises
    /\ ballots' = ballots
    /\ LET acceptedVals == {accepts[a].value : a \in acceptors | 
                            accepts[a].ballot = b /\ accepts[a].value # NULL} IN
        /\ IF acceptedVals # {} THEN
            /\ chosen' = CHOOSE v' \in acceptedVals : TRUE
            /\ chosenBallot' = b
            /\ chosenBy' = p

            /\ chosen' = chosen
            /\ chosenBallot' = chosenBallot
            /\ chosenBy' = chosenBy
    /\ chosen' = chosen
    /\ chosenBallot' = chosenBallot
    /\ chosenBy' = chosenBy

\* Next-state relation
Next ==
    \/ \E p \in proposers : \E v \in Nat : Prepare(p, v)
    \/ \E p \in proposers : \E v \in Nat : Accept(p, v)

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, ballots, promises, accepts, chosen, chosenBallot, chosenBy>>

\* Type invariant
TypeOK ==
    /\ acceptors \subseteq Nat
    /\ proposers \subseteq Nat
    /\ ballots \in [proposers -> Nat]
    /\ promises \in [acceptors -> [ballot -> Nat, value -> Nat]]
    /\ accepts \in [acceptors -> [ballot -> Nat, value -> Nat]]
    /\ chosen \in Nat \/ chosen = NULL
    /\ chosenBallot \in Nat
    /\ chosenBy \in proposers \/ chosenBy = NULL

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE
VARIABLES channelState, currentChunk, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ sentChunks \in Seq(Seq(Nat))
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ currentChunk \in Nat
    /\ channelState \in {"sent", "lost"}

Init ==
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ currentChunk = 1
    /\ channelState = "sent"

SendChunk ==
    /\ channelState = "sent"
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, SubSeq(FILE, (currentChunk-1)*CHUNK_SIZE+1, Min(currentChunk*CHUNK_SIZE, Len(FILE))))
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ currentChunk' = currentChunk + 1
    /\ channelState' = "sent"

LoseChunk ==
    /\ channelState = "sent"
    /\ channelState' = "lost"

Retransmit ==
    /\ channelState = "lost"
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ channelState' = "sent"

GiveUp ==
    /\ channelState = "lost"
    /\ retransmitCount' = MAX_RETRIES
    /\ channelState' = "sent"

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ LoseChunk
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ GiveUp

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<sentChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunk, channelState>> /\ TypeOK

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES db, txns, snapshot, writes, nextTxId
CONSTANTS Keys, Values

(* Types *)
TypeOK == /\ db \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ txns \subseteq Nat
          /\ snapshot \in [txns -> [Keys -> Values]]
          /\ writes \in [txns -> [Keys -> Values]]
          /\ nextTxId \in Nat
          /\ Keys \subseteq DOMAIN db
          /\ Values \subseteq DOMAIN [Keys -> Values]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ db = [k \in Keys |-> Values[1]] \* All keys initialized to first value
    /\ txns = {} 
    /\ snapshot = [t \in txns |-> [k \in Keys |-> db[k]]]
    /\ writes = [t \in txns |-> [k \in Keys |-> db[k]]]
    /\ nextTxId = 1

(* Transaction actions *)
BeginTx ==
    /\ txns' = txns \cup {nextTxId}
    /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![nextTxId] = [k \in Keys |-> db[k]]]
    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![nextTxId] = [k \in Keys |-> db[k]]]
    /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db>>

ReadTx(t, k) ==
    /\ t \in txns
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, txns, snapshot, writes, nextTxId>>

WriteTx(t, k, v) ==
    /\ t \in txns
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ v \in Values
    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t] = [writes[t] EXCEPT ![k] = v]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, txns, snapshot, nextTxId>>

CommitTx(t) ==
    /\ t \in txns
    /\ \A k \in Keys : 
          /\ writes[t][k] = snapshot[t][k] \* No write-write conflict
    /\ db' = [db EXCEPT ![k] = writes[t][k] : k \in Keys]
    /\ txns' = txns \ {t}
    /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![t] = UNCHANGED]
    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t] = UNCHANGED]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<nextTxId>>

AbortTx(t) ==
    /\ t \in txns
    /\ txns' = txns \ {t}
    /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![t] = UNCHANGED]
    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t] = UNCHANGED]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, nextTxId>>

Next ==
    \/ \E t \in txns : BeginTx
    \/ \E t \in txns : \E k \in Keys : ReadTx(t, k)
    \/ \E t \in txns : \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : WriteTx(t, k, v)
    \/ \E t \in txns : CommitTx(t)
    \/ \E t \in txns : AbortTx(t)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, txns, snapshot, writes, nextTxId>> /\ TypeOK

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, offsets



(* RandomOffset returns an integer offset in the range -maxDrift..maxDrift *)
maxDrift == 1

RandomOffset == [j \in 1..N |-> CHOOSE k \in -maxDrift..maxDrift |-> k]

(* Type checking *)
TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Nat]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ clocks == [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Next state *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          LET newOffset == offsets[i] + CHOOSE k \in -maxDrift..maxDrift : k
          IN /\ offsets' == [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = newOffset]
             /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + newOffset]

(* After one round, all clocks are within epsilon of each other *)
AllWithinEpsilon == \A i, j \in 1..N : Abs(clocks[i] - clocks[j]) <= epsilon

Spec == Init /\ Next /\ AllWithinEpsilon

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES flag, turn, 0, 1

(* flag is a sequence of booleans indexed by 0..1 *)
(* turn is an integer 0 or 1 *)

TypeOK == /\ flag \in Seq(2)
          /\ turn \in 0..1

Init == /\ flag = <<FALSE, FALSE>>
        /\ turn = 0

(* Process 0's actions *)
P0Entry ==
    /\ flag[0] := TRUE
    /\ turn := 1
    /\ flag[1] = FALSE
    \/ turn = 0

P0Exit ==
    /\ flag[0] := FALSE

(* Process 1's actions *)
P1Entry ==
    /\ flag[1] := TRUE
    /\ turn := 0
    /\ flag[0] = FALSE
    \/ turn = 1

P1Exit ==
    /\ flag[1] := FALSE

Next ==
    \/ /\ P0Entry
       /\ P0Exit
    \/ /\ P1Entry
       /\ P1Exit

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
CONSTANTS RandomSubset

VARIABLES known, infected

(* known: a function mapping each node to the set of nodes it knows about *)
(* infected: a set of nodes that have received the update *)

(* The set of all nodes *)
Nodes == 1..N

(* Initialization: all nodes know only themselves; no node is infected *)
Init == 
  /\ known = [i \in Nodes |-> {i}]
  /\ infected = {}

(* A node i spreads its known set to a random subset of nodes *)
Spread(i) == 
  /\ i \in Nodes
  /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![j] = 
        IF j \in RandomSubset(Nodes \ {i}) THEN known[j] \cup known[i]

  /\ infected' = infected

(* A node i receives updates from a random subset of nodes *)
Receive(i) == 
  /\ i \in Nodes
  /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup 
        UNION { known[j] : j \in RandomSubset(Nodes \ {i}) }]
  /\ infected' = infected \cup {i}

(* A node i becomes infected if it receives an update *)
Infect(i) == 
  /\ i \in Nodes
  /\ known' = known
  /\ infected' = infected \cup {i}

(* Next-state relation: each node may spread, receive, or become infected *)
Next == 
  \E i \in Nodes :
    \/ Spread(i)
    \/ Receive(i)
    \/ Infect(i)

(* Type correctness invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ known \in [Nodes -> SUBSET Nodes]
  /\ infected \in SUBSET Nodes

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>> /\ TypeOK

(* Liveness property: eventual convergence *)
Convergence == 
  \A i \in Nodes : <> (i \in infected)

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLES free, allocated

(* free is a subset of Pages that are currently free *)
(* allocated is a function from Clients to subsets of Pages *)

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \in [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ free' = Pages \ allocated'
        /\ allocated' = [c \in Clients |-> allocated[c] \cup (Pages \ allocated)]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId
TypeOK == 
    /\ subscribers \in [Topic -> SUBSET SubscriberId]
    /\ messages \in [Topic -> Seq(Message)]
    /\ nextMsgId \in Nat
    /\ nextSubId \in Nat

(* Constants *)
Topic == [topicId: Nat]
SubscriberId == [subId: Nat]
Message == [msgId: Nat, content: Seq(Nat)]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ subscribers = [t \in Topic |-> {}]
    /\ messages = [t \in Topic |-> <<>>]
    /\ nextMsgId = 0
    /\ nextSubId = 0

(* Actions *)

(* Register a new subscriber for a topic *)
Register(sub, topic) == 
    /\ sub \in SubscriberId
    /\ topic \in Topic
    /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![topic] = subscribers[topic] \cup {sub}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

(* Post a new message on a topic *)
Post(topic, content) == 
    /\ topic \in Topic
    /\ content \in Seq(Nat)
    /\ msgId = nextMsgId
    /\ newMsg = [msgId |-> msgId, content |-> content]
    /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(messages[topic], newMsg)]
    /\ nextMsgId' = nextMsgId + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, nextSubId>>

(* Deliver messages to subscribers *)
Deliver(sub, topic) == 
    /\ sub \in SubscriberId
    /\ topic \in Topic
    /\ subscribers[topic] = {} \lor sub \in subscribers[topic]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \/ \E sub \in SubscriberId : \E topic \in Topic : Register(sub, topic)
    \/ \E topic \in Topic : \E content \in Seq(Nat) : Post(topic, content)
    \/ \E sub \in SubscriberId : \E topic \in Topic : Deliver(sub, topic)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES turn, wants


              /\ wants[1] := FALSE
          \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
              /\ wants[2] = TRUE
              /\ turn = 2
              /\ wants[2] := FALSE
          \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
              /\ wants[2] = TRUE
              /\ turn = 1
              /\ wants[1] := FALSE
          \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
              /\ wants[2] = TRUE
              /\ turn = 2
              /\ wants[2] := FALSE
*)

(* Safety invariant: mutual exclusion *)
TypeOK == /\ turn \in {1, 2}
          /\ wants \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ \A i, j \in {1, 2} : i /= j => ~(wants[i] /\ wants[j])

(* Liveness invariant: each process eventually exits critical section *)
Liveness == \A i \in {1, 2} : \E wants[i] = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts


   Next ==
     \E n \in 1..N :
       \E m \in 1..N :
         \E newVal \in counts[n][m] + 1 :
           counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = newVal]
   (* Merge operation *)
   Merge ==
     \E n \in 1..N :
       \E m \in 1..N :
         \E newVal \in counts[n][m] :
           counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], newVal)]
   Init ==
     counts = [n \in 1..N |-> [m \in 1..N |-> 0]]
   Next ==
     Next \vee Merge
   Spec ==
     Init /\ [][Next]_counts
*)


Init ==
  counts = [n \in 1..N |-> [m \in 1..N |-> 0]]

(* Each node increments its own slot *)
Increment(n, m) ==
  \E newVal \in counts[n][m] + 1 :
    counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = newVal]

(* Merge operation: element-wise max *)
Merge(n, m) ==
  \E newVal \in counts[n][m] :
    counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], newVal)]

Next ==
  \E n \in 1..N :
    \E m \in 1..N :
      Increment(n, m) \vee Merge(n, m)

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_counts


Total ==
  \Sum n \in 1..N : \Sum m \in 1..N : counts[n][m]

(* --type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
  \A n \in 1..N : \A m \in 1..N : counts[n][m] \in Nat
